code:
---
config:
  theme: neo
  layout: dagre
---
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  classDef draftC fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef publicC fill:#bbf8c0,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef unlistedC fill:#f9f7ae,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef privateC fill:#ddd6f3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef withdrawnC fill:#fcbbbb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  [*] --> draft
  draft --> public:Publish
  draft --> unlisted:Link only
  public --> unlisted:Unlist
  unlisted --> public:List
  public --> private:Hide(Private)
  unlisted --> private:Hide(Private)
  private --> public:Re-publish
  private --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  public --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  unlisted --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  withdrawn --> public:Restore(Listed)
  withdrawn --> [*]
  draft:Draft
  public:Public
  unlisted:Unlisted
  private:Private
  withdrawn:Withdrawn
  note right of draft : Drafts are only visible to editors.
  note right of public : Public posts are listed and discoverable.
  note right of unlisted : Unlisted posts are shared by URL only.
  note right of private : Private posts are hidden from everyone.
  note right of withdrawn : Withdrawn posts are removed from public view.
  class draft draftC
  class public publicC
  class unlisted unlistedC
  class private privateC
  class withdrawn withdrawnC

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个内容发布系统的状态图，核心是五种状态：Draft草稿、Public公开、Unlisted仅链接访问、Private私密、还有Withdrawn已撤回。起点是Draft，终点可以是Withdrawn或者直接结束。
明白，方向用LR横向布局。我注意到Unlisted和Private都有"隐藏"的概念，它们的区别是什么？另外Withdrawn是彻底删除还是可以恢复？
Unlisted是"仅链接可见"，有URL就能看；Private是"完全隐藏"，谁都看不到。Withdrawn可以Restore回到Public状态，也可以彻底结束。Draft只能被编辑者看到，这是最开始的起点。
好的，我先把主流程画出来：Draft可以Publish到Public，也可以Link only到Unlisted；Public和Unlisted都能Hide变成Private，也都能Withdraw；Private可以Re-publish回Public，也能Withdraw。
对，还有Unlisted和Public之间可以互相切换：Public可以Unlist变成Unlisted，Unlisted可以List回到Public。Withdrawn那边要有Restore(Listed)回到Public，也可以直接到终点。
状态流转都画好了。现在给每个状态加上样式区分：Draft用粉色，Public用绿色，Unlisted用黄色，Private用紫色，Withdrawn用红色，这样一眼就能区分。
最后在每个状态右边加注释说明：Draft标注"仅编辑者可见"，Public是"公开可发现"，Unlisted是"仅URL分享"，Private是"对所有人隐藏"，Withdrawn是"已从公开视图移除"。
完成！五种状态、完整流转、颜色区分、右侧注释都加上了。起点[*]到Draft，终点从Withdrawn可以Restore或直接结束，整个发布生命周期都覆盖到了。
